settings.heading: Core Balance's mission is to provide a complete line of fully balanced horse supplements for all equine disciplines.

settings.text:
At our core, we are committed to elevating the health and performance of today's equine athletes. As a US-based organization, we proudly craft our products from all-natural, highest quality ingredients, leveraging innovative scientific formulations. Our transparent and precise labeling ensures our customers know exactly what they're giving their horses, thereby supporting enhanced nutritional utilization. We strive to be a comprehensive solution, offering products that not only protect joints and reduce stress but also bolster mental and physical aptitude. We are devoted to supporting every aspect of the equine lifecycle, from promoting fertility and proper growth to enhancing focus and concentration, and encouraging healthy weight gain.

Our products...

  • Manufactured in the United States
  • Made with all-natural ingredients
  • The optimum scientific formulation for today's equine athlete
  • Made with only the highest quality ingredients
  • Have the most accurate ingredient labeling
  • Support better utilization of nutrition
  • Provide joint protection
  • Reduce stress
  • Support mental and physical aptitude
  • Promote fertility and proper growth
  • Increase focus and concentration
  • Promote weight gain

We are passionate about empowering horse owners, breeders, and trainers with products that deliver on our promise: Better Health, Better Performance.
